steps.title: Determine the percentage of students
steps.content:
The given percentages (parents 15%, teachers 45%, administrators 25%) account for: $15\% + 45\% + 25\% = 85\%$
Students make up the remainder: $100\% - 85\% = 15\%$

steps.title: Find the total committee size
steps.content:
We know 6 students represent 15% of the committee. Setting up the equation:
$$0.15 \times \text{Total} = 6$$
$$\text{Total} = \frac{6}{0.15} = 40 \text{ people}$$

steps.title: Calculate teachers and administrators, then find the difference
steps.content:
Teachers: $45\% \times 40 = 18$
Administrators: $25\% \times 40 = 10$

The difference is: $18 - 10 = 8$
There are 8 more teachers invited than administrators.
